description: Use this API to tabulate the amount of load reduction in a specified subsystem due to the voltage at the bus to which the load is connected being below PQBRAK (for constant MVA load) or 0.5 (for constant current load. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = load_reduction(sid, all, aozopt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: aozopt
parameters.description: Subsystem selection option when area, owner and/or zone are included in the subsystem selection criteria. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only loads in subsystem SID.

aozopt.description: use the area, owner and/or zone assignments of the bus to which the load is connected.
use the area, owner and/or zone assignments of the load.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
